SEARCH
Package ai.alumnium.accessibility

Class AccessibilityElement

java.lang.Object
ai.alumnium.accessibility.AccessibilityElement
public final class AccessibilityElement extends Object
Mutable bag of accessibility-element properties produced by the three accessibility-tree flavours.

Fields are nullable so callers can test for presence before use. frame is kept as Object because Playwright's Frame type is only available at runtime when the Playwright driver is on the classpath (we avoid a hard compile-time dependency in this module).
